page_metadata.biotools__summary: LIden determines allele sharing status among family members using high-density SNP data. It takes SNP genotype data, pedigree structure and physical-locus-file as input, and outputs allele sharing graphical display files and linked regions
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: LIden determines allele sharing status among family members using high-density SNP data. It takes SNP genotype data, pedigree structure and physical-locus-file as input, and outputs allele sharing graphical display files and linked regions
